array.string:
LOG="/Users/bryanhennigan/Desktop/Hen Solutions LLC/Podcasts/Hennigan's Huddle/cron.log" TS="$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
# Try the Cloudflare Worker endpoint first RESULT=$(/usr/bin/curl -s -w "\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}\nTIME:%{time_total}s" \ --retry 2 --retry-delay 15 --retry-all-errors --max-time 30 \ "https://podcast.hhsolutions.cloud/api/cron" 2>&1)
HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep "HTTP_CODE:" | cut -d: -f2) ELAPSED=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep "TIME:" | cut -d: -f2) BODY=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep -v "HTTP_CODE:" | grep -v "TIME:")
echo "[$TS] Worker: HTTP $HTTP_CODE in $ELAPSED — $BODY" >> "$LOG"
# If Worker failed, log it clearly if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "000" ] || [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "500" ] || [ -z "$HTTP_CODE" ]; then echo "[$TS] Worker FAILED (HTTP $HTTP_CODE). The automated pipeline at matterdigest.pages.dev is the primary system." >> "$LOG" fi
